[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 000101110 4
2 100110110 5
3 010100011 4
4 101110010 5
5 010111110 6
6 010111010 5
7 111001011 6
